name: Uelzen Germany Multi-Spectral Satellite Imagery Catalog 1984-1986
description: A catalog of multi-spectral satellite imagery and associated metadata for the Uelzen region in Germany, covering the period from May 1984 to October 1986. The dataset includes references to 6-band color composite GeoTIFF files, observation dates, and precise geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) for the study site, linked to the ESIS_Uelzen event.
